query:
-- 先查看需要修正的記錄
SELECT 
  a.id,
  a.scheduledStart,
  a.scheduledEnd,
  a.scheduledHours,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, a.scheduledStart, a.scheduledEnd) as correct_hours
FROM assignments a
WHERE a.workerId = 330087 AND a.scheduledHours < 0;
command:

  a.id,
  a.scheduledStart,
  a.scheduledEnd,
  a.scheduledHours,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, a.scheduledStart, a.scheduledEnd) as correct_hours
FROM assignments a
WHERE a.workerId = 330087 AND a.scheduledHours < 0;
